name: team_memory_write
description: Store or update data in the team's shared memory. Use this to save workflow progress, temporary session data, learned patterns, or any information you need to remember for future team executions. Memory is automatically structured and can be retrieved later by any team member. Team context is automatically inferred from the agent's team membership.

context.description: Memory context to write to - workflow for current task state, session for temporary data, persistent for long-term patterns, shared for team-shared data

path.description: Specific JSON path to write to (e.g., 'current_step', 'team_preferences.format'). If not provided, data will be merged into the context root

data.description: The data to store in team memory. Can be any valid JSON object or primitive value

merge_strategy.description: How to handle existing data - merge objects together, replace completely, or append to arrays
